positive: A highly stylized, clean silhouette of a whimsical, mythical creature—a fusion of a graceful stag and celestial plumage, standing in a peaceful, majestic pose. The creature should be rendered in solid, crisp black against a vibrant, gradient pastel background of soft lilac blending into pale mint green. Focus on clean lines and strong contrasts. Composition should be centered and ideal for a repeat pattern or large apparel graphic. Use a minimalist, elegant 'sacred geometry' style with intricate, engraved details visible in the antlers and feathers. Cinematic, high contrast, vector illustration aesthetic, perfect for screen printing, isolated on background.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, low detail, grunge, photorealism, sketch, cartoon
